caption: The video captures a scene from a conference or seminar, likely focused on technology or innovation, as suggested by the "has geek" text on the screen. The setting is dimly lit, with an audience seated in rows, attentively watching a presentation. In the foreground, a man wearing a blue t-shirt with the word "excel" and a lanyard stands with his arms crossed, possibly a speaker or organizer. Behind him, another individual is seen holding their chin thoughtfully, indicating engagement with the content. The overall atmosphere suggests a professional and intellectual environment where ideas are being shared and discussed.
